zh.lifeSummary: 當Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube於0971年出生在法國德 艾斯特奧布巴-素爾-奧布時，他的父親Comte Nocher I de la Ferté-sur-Aube50歲，母親Aelis Of Soissons42歲。他於大約0990年與Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布巴-素爾-奧布。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube于0971年出生在法国德 艾斯特奧布巴-素爾-奧布时，他的父亲Comte Nocher I de la Ferté-sur-Aube50岁，母亲Aelis Of Soissons42岁。他于大约0990年与Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布巴-素爾-奧布。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Nocher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name denoting someone who lived in a rocky place, from rocher ‘rock, crag, boulder’, or a habitational name from a place called Rocher. Compare Durocher .
Altered form of French   Desrochers  .
History: Pierre Desrochers/Rocher from Saint-Macoux in Vienne, France, married Suzanne Rabouin in Batiscan, QC, in 1696.

variants.name: Rocheleau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Armand, Alphonse, Andre, Normand, Aurore, Cecile, Elphege, Emile, Fernand, Gilles, Mathieu.

Altered form of French Rochereau: topographic name from a diminutive of rocher ‘rock, crag, boulder’ (see Rocher ), or a habitational name from (Le) Rochereau, the name of several places in the western part of France. Compare Rushlow .

variants.name: Rochon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Andre, Aurele, Gaston, Michel, Yves, Adrien, Antoine, Fernande, Gaetan, Germain, Gilles.
Altered form of French Rocheron: topographic name from a diminutive of rocher ‘rock, crag, boulder’ (see Rocher ), or a habitational name from Le Rocheron, the name of two places in Indre-et-Loire.
French: diminutive of   Roche   ‘rock’.

variants.name: Durocher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Fernand, Gilles, Marcel, Normand, Alain, Antoine, Armand, Bibiane, Emile, Emilien, Gaetan.

French: topographic name from rocher ‘rock, crag, boulder’, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone who lived in a rocky place; or a habitational name for someone from Le Rocher, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Derusha and Rocher .
Altered form of French   Desrochers  , a cognate of 1 above.

en.lifeSummary: When Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube was born in 0971, in Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Grand Est, France, his father, Comte Nocher I de la Ferté-sur-Aube, was 50 and his mother, Aelis Of Soissons, was 42. He married Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine about 0990. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

historicEvents.description: Attestée sous les formes Segessera, Barrisiica, Barris ca, Baro castelli, castelli Baris (monnaies carolingiennes), Barrum super Albam (1061), Castrum Barris montis (1065), Barrense castrum, Barrense oppidum (1097), Barrenses (1102), Barrum castrum super Albam (1104), Vetus castrum, villa Barrensis (1149), Bar-sur-Aube (vers 1200). Le nom de la ville se trouve également sous la forme Barrum ad Albam dans les archives ecclésiastiques. L'existence de Bar-sur-Aube remonte à l’Antiquité.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube est né en 0971, à Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Grand Est, France, son père, Comte Nocher I de la Ferté-sur-Aube, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Aelis Of Soissons, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine environ 0990. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé à Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube 0971 in Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Comte Nocher I de la Ferté-sur-Aube 50 und seine Mutter Aelis Of Soissons 42. Er hat um 0990 Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube è nato il nel 0971 nel Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Comte Nocher I de la Ferté-sur-Aube, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Aelis Of Soissons, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine circa 0990. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aubeが0971年にフランスグランド エストアウベバー-スル-アウベで生まれた時，父Comte Nocher I de la Ferté-sur-Aubeは50歳，母Aelis Of Soissonsは42歳であった。約0990年にCountess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベバー-スル-アウベで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube(이)가 0971년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 바-수-오브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte Nocher I de la Ferté-sur-Aube(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Aelis Of Soissons(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 0990년 Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 바-수-오브에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube nasceu em 0971, em Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Comte Nocher I de la Ferté-sur-Aube, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Aelis Of Soissons, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine aproximadamente 0990. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube родился в 0971 г. в местности бар-сур-ауб, ауб, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte Nocher I de la Ferté-sur-Aube было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Aelis Of Soissons, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine около 0990 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в местности бар-сур-ауб, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube nació en 0971, en Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Comte Nocher I de la Ferté-sur-Aube, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Aelis Of Soissons, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine aproximadamente 0990. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
